message:
feat(analytics): implement agent performance analytics service

Add comprehensive agent performance analytics including:
- Productivity metrics (tasks completed, success rate, duration)
- Quality metrics (error rate, error categorization)
- Efficiency metrics (tokens per task, efficiency score)
- Model comparison reports
- AI-powered recommendations for performance improvement
- Fleet-wide analytics overview

Implements flywheel_gateway-6wp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
